/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.4 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -o mps_engine.cpython-311-darwin.so CMakeFiles/mps_engine.dir/src/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mps_engine.dir/src/mps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mps_engine.dir/src/wrapper.cpp.o
